Primal Velium Brawl Stick  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 17
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 STA: +8 CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 AGI: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Required level of 55.
Effect: Avatar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Primal Velium Brawl Stick
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 17
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 STA: +8 CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 AGI: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Required level of 55.
Effect: Avatar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Aiuza
Lucy Entry By:Biny
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-30 14:23:45
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
NPC Name
sleeper 1.0 - Hraashna the Warder
sleeper 1.0 - Nanzata the Warder
sleeper 1.0 - Ventani the Warder
The Progenitor
Tukaarak the Warder


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

who it should go to
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2004 at 3:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591791021110
152 posts
by the time you get to primal, youre probably going to be farming your brains out anyway. go to a monk? maybe, but monks can also use the battlehammer. my guilds been farming primal and probably wont stop until they rot. in fact, were even destroying primals, last raid a claidhmore and a war lance rotted.

casters would probably end up with this one way or another, i think one of the first times i saw it was on a chanter.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 28 2003 at 5:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) that would be cool for a warrior to have all the avatar weps that drop here just work on another skill il pull out my other primal/ancient wep from ST !!
wizards rock with this
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2002 at 1:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361674561
37 posts
I ported in to WC rings and there was a level 60 wizard soloing the druids with this weapon, only using melee. Pretty cool!
▲ Page top
awesome proc
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2002 at 9:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570790257
33 posts
i have seen many a monk use this till it procs and then switch to shovel of the harvest. the proc on this weapon is one of the best buffs in the game! huge stat bonuses and 100atk which is insane. this is one reason i think it should go to some type of melee is for the proc but i have no problem with the people who say this should go to a caster. as far as i have seen this is the best dmg dealing weapon that any type of finger wigglers can use. if i had a high lvl ench or necro i would love to have one!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 13 2002 at 10:24 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) im a level 2 monk and i have this item!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! while those idiots were sitting there fighting over who should get it i looted it!! i snuck into the raid!!!! wow !!! when i hit lvl 55 im gana do so much damage!!! wow!!!
Want!

If this dropped while I was around I'd make sure an enchanter got it. ***** monks, anytime they get in trouble they just have to push a button and everything is all better. Lets face it, enchanters blow outside of groups (don't argue with this) and when they are running through a low lvl and get attacked by a greenie the only way for them to get rid of it is to blow a **** load of mana. I don't play a chanter, I just feel sorry for em.

just die, right now, what enchanter would ever melee. 2 handed with 8 int sucks...there are one handed weapons with 20 int, such as your epic
▲ Page top
RE: Damn monks
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 4:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751836639
91 posts
Hm. I play a chanter. Level 51 chanter...

Not once in a raid have I ever decided that I needed to melee. Ever. And my 2hb skill is so crappy that this'd never proc for me. Let's couple that with my near base dex.

The stats? I can find a hell of a lot better on, say, My Velk's Tome and Orb of Infinite Void combo.

Give this to a monk. Seriously, this is CLEARLY a monk weapon, and I mean that for a change.

I, for one, will go to Vex Thal and get me a Tome of Secrets rather than this crap. The only thing I can think of using this dog **** for is to farm Acrylia in Tenebrous. Otherwise, it'd be rotting in my bank unless I feel like being funny.
▲ Page top
RE: Damn monks
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2004 at 11:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341609542
3 posts
Most caster gear has bonuses to Dex......me as a lvl 58 mage has almost 200 dex unbuffed with max'd int for my level (255....really 266 but it won't go over) if you have near base dex your gear must suck.

In case you are wondering, dex is important for casters also......which is why a lot of caster gear has it....it increases the chances of spell crits....same with melee crits for fighters.
▲ Page top
RE: Damn monks
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2004 at 1:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245905595
343 posts
Well, Erudites have an 80 base dex... soooo with that in mind...

80 plus 100 plus 100 = 280.

NDT = 100 or 120 dex, I'll go with 100.
Avatar gives 100 dex....

How about that? Your dex is maxed as a chanter.

Stats on this weapon are incorrect/have been changed.. maybe it's because the Sleeper has been woken on our server (tholuxe paels) not sure though if that is why

Damage is now 45, delay 44 and has ac of 17, the rest of the stats are correct

Heh, got one of these due to the fact we had no one else to use it

I must say though, it's certainly a fun toy, and I can hardly get enough of it...

# Sep 03 2001 at 4:52 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
...but in my own experience this staff goes to casters, believe it or not. Cause the warders and the progenitor doesn't just drop one item at a time, but up to 5 at least. Thus, when this baby drops there will be other 1h weps for the meleers. I have seen pure casters do serious damage even to named dragons with this weapon.

Enchanter with this weapon in BotB ... then shissar himself and maybe borrow a CoF from one of the meleers... He'd smack the opponent chanters with ease.

Not one of the melee guys I have been in ST with wanted this wep.

i have three level 60's on rallos zek YES three i am not kidding messing around or lieing *eqaddict12@yahoo.com if u do not believe me i will log on them and go un anon for u*

THIS ITEM SHOULD 100% OF THE TIME GO TO A CASTER OF SOME SORT FOR MELEEING PURPOSES

it is very easy to get your int/*extra stat* up tp 200 with buffs and with shissar and a haste item you will seriously do a LOT more dmg then you would have ever imagined not to mension the chance to knock back with a 2hb item *causes 55+ mobs to get innturupted because stunn doesn't work* the 1h weapons go to melees becuase they are slightly better *u can have two*

i have a 52 monk twink i woulldn't ever loot one of these *last two went to druids*

thanks for all ur time
60ench
60war
60mage
rallos zek

# Nov 16 2001 at 8:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757765879
Scholar
23 posts
Guilds that can get this sort of gear for the most part worship at the alter of the Holy Trinity and are Min/Maxed. You are not going to find many hybrids running around the Sleepers Tomb. Why have a fighter who does at best 85% of the damage of a Warrior for Knights, but can't tank uber mobs, or one does around the same damage as a Warrior in the case of Rangers, but are less efficient tanking high level mobs at all? It's the payoff for warriors spending 54 levels as big, dumb, one dimentional bruts who are boring to play =P

RE: NBG
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 7:31 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591768486368
15 posts
Uh, not sure what hybrids you have in your guild, or what classes, but any high end Ranger can easily, VERY easily, outdamage any warrior. Warriors are up front to TAKE damage, not dish it. Meanwhile your Rogues, Rangers, and SK's DISH the damage.

These two dragons are not that difficult, although as someone said you need a plan. Klandicar doable with 24-30, Zlandicar with 35-40.

Some guild may use less but this is what we have has success with.

As far as who would get the Primal Velium Brawlstick? Warriors wouldn't use, Monk's might use, I would definitly use :)
